features.description: Dark-frame ratio plus white-frame ratio for the same sample.
Mean sharpness divided by mean contrast for the same sample.
Maximum motion magnitude divided by mean motion magnitude for the same sample.
Maximum flow-warp residual divided by mean flow-warp residual for the same sample.
Indicator set to 1 when audio window metrics are present for the same sample, otherwise 0.
Fraction of core evidence modules with available same-sample evidence.
